ogTitle: White Sands vs White Well Corner: Climate Safety

heading: White Sands vs White Well Corner — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between White Sands, South Australia and White Well Corner, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: White Well Corner has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to White Sands (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is White Sands or White Well Corner safer from flooding?
faq.answer: White Sands has a flood risk score of 35/100, while White Well Corner scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: White Sands scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. White Well Corner scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in White Sands or White Well Corner?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. White Well Corner has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
